title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank GREEN PIN is a paperless PIN generation solution that enables IDBI Bank Debit Cardholders to securely generate their Debit card PIN in electronic form through multiple delivery channels. Green PIN as the name suggests, helps save paper thus contributing to earth’s environment as well as contributes to reduce the carbon foot print. Green PIN initiative offers a hassle free mechanism to generate Debit-cum-ATM PIN for existing as well as new Debit card customers. Customers can set their PIN for new debit cards instantly after receiving the debit card or make use of this functionality in case they forget their existing Debit-cum-ATM Card PIN. Customers can easily use this service without visiting the branch/ contact the customer care and wait for the PIN mailer. 
Can be used by both existing as well as new customers
Customers can reset their ATM PIN instantly using Green PIN solution 
(Please Note: You cannot set your last PIN as your new PIN. Please choose different 4-digit PIN.)
Green PIN generation through IDBI Bank ATM is a two-step process. In the first step, customer needs to generate an OTP using IDBI Bank ATM and in the second step customer needs to validate the OTP and set a PIN of his choice. 
  * Select Generate OTP option to receive OTP & request ID on your registered Mobile number 
  * Reinsert your Debit Card and again select Generate ATM PIN option 
  * Select Validate OTP and enter the OTP & Request ID received on your registered Mobile Number 
  * Post successful validation customer will be prompted to create a new PIN of his choice 


  * Dial IDBI Bank Phone Banking Nos. 18002094324 or 1800-22-1070. For overseas customers please dial 022-67719100.
  * Choose the Option to Generate ATM PIN in the main menu of IVR and enter Customer ID & Debit Card number for which the PIN needs to be generated 
  * Validate the OTP sent to the registered Mobile Number and create a new PIN of your choice 


To activate the Card, please use it at any Bank’s ATM/POS machine with the PIN set by you. 
Generate your Debit-cum-ATM PIN through Internet Banking
  * Click “Menu > Cards > Debit Card Services > Pin Generation” Option. 
  * Select Debit Card No., Pin re-generation Reason and Click SUBMIT. 
  * Enter New PIN (Last set PIN not allowed), Confirm New PIN and Enter OTP sent to your registered Mobile Number in respective field then click SUBMIT.
  * “Debit card pin has been successfully reset” message is displayed.


New Debit Card PIN get generated and card get activated instantly.
Green PIN generation through SMS is a two-step process. In the first step, customer needs to generate an OTP by sending SMS to 9820346920/9821043718 and in the second step customer needs to validate the OTP at IDBI Bank ATM and set a PIN of his choice. 
  * Type GREENPIN  Last 6 digits of your Debit Card in the textbox and send it to 9820346920. Alternatively, you may send the same SMS to 9821043718.
  * You will receive OTP & request ID on your registered Mobile number. OTP will be valid only for 30 minutes. 
  * Please go to any IDBI Bank ATM and insert your Debit Card and select Generate ATM PIN option 
  * Select Validate OTP and enter the OTP & Request ID received on your registered Mobile Number
  * Post successful validation customer will be prompted to create a new PIN of his choice
